title: Cloud Security & Trust Management Framework
description: A flowchart illustrating the core components and their interdependencies for establishing security and trust in cloud computing.
relationships: Customer defines security requirements and relies on CSP & TTP for assurance
CSP implements and manages Security Controls & Policies
TTP audits CSP against Compliance Framework to verify trust
Compliance Framework (e.g., ISO 27001, SOC 2) sets the standards for all elements
